section.intent: Immediate visual impact with the main trailer.
section.contentHints: Auto-playing muted background video, large movie title logo, 'Watch Trailer' play button.

designPlan.role: Page opener and value proposition anchor
designPlan.goal: Capture 100% of the user's attention with high-fidelity video.
designPlan.roleFit: Immediately satisfies the fan's desire for 'blockbuster' visuals.
designPlan.taskLoopFocus: The entry point of the Ticket Booking Journey.
designPlan.capabilityFocus: Demonstrates 'Immersive Content Delivery' through full-screen video.
designPlan.informationArchitecture: Centered movie logo, secondary 'Watch Trailer' button, and scroll indicator.
designPlan.visualIntent: Dark, cinematic, and high-contrast with the Marvel Red logo.
designPlan.interactionIntent: Play button opens a high-res trailer in a modal.
designPlan.contentStrategy: Visuals first; minimal text to avoid cluttering the cinematic frame.
constraints: Video must be muted and loop seamlessly.
designPlan.rationale: The hero section sets the tone and establishes the 'superhero' scale of the experience.

pageContext.title: Movie Home
pageContext.description: The main landing experience for the movie promotion.

pageDesignPlan.pageGoal: The main landing experience for the movie promotion.
pageDesignPlan.roleFit: This page primarily serves Movie Fan.
pageDesignPlan.capabilityFocus: This page should make Immersive Content Delivery, Ticketing Integration understandable and actionable.
pageDesignPlan.taskLoopCoverage: Help users progress through Ticket Booking Journey, Ticket Booking Journey.
pageDesignPlan.narrativeArc: Move from orientation to persuasion, then social proof, and finish with a decisive conversion close.
pageDesignPlan.layoutStrategy: Use section rhythm, spacing, and contrast to support the entry stage of the user journey rather than making every block equally loud.
hierarchy: The first viewport should establish context and value quickly.
Mid-page sections should deepen trust or explain the offer.
Lower-page sections should reduce friction and reinforce action.
pageDesignPlan.transitionStrategy: Make transitions feel intentional through spacing, contrast shifts, and restrained motion rather than decorative separators.
sharedShellNotes: Assume global layout sections frame the page experience.
Keep page-specific sections visually coherent with the shared shell.
constraints: Preserve the given section order unless a wrapper or grouping is required for coherence.
Avoid repetitive section pacing; vary density and emphasis across the page.
pageDesignPlan.rationale: Default page planner framed Movie Home around role needs and the MVP journey rather than isolated sections.
